name: Hemingway Daiquiri

spec.method_detail: Shake hard with ice. Double strain into chilled coupe.

history: Also called the 'Papa Doble,' Hemingway ordered his daiquiris at La Floridita in Havana with double rum, no sugar, and grapefruit juice — he was diabetic. The modern version adds a small amount of maraschino for balance. Hemingway allegedly drank a dozen of these at a sitting.
